import pytest
from source import find_in_sorted

def test_quixbugs_find_in_sorted():
    # Test case that reveals the bug
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    x = 7
    result = find_in_sorted(arr, x)
    assert result == -1, "Expected find_in_sorted to return -1 when target is not found in the upper half"

def test_find_in_sorted_fixed():
    # Test case that confirms the fix works
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    x = 7
    result = find_in_sorted(arr, x)
    assert result == -1, "Expected find_in_sorted to return -1 when target is not found in the upper half"
